blocks.text: Of the Korahites. A psalm. A song. The Lord loves the gates of Zion, His foundation on the holy mountains, more than all the dwellings of Jacob.
Glorious things are spoken of you, O city of God. Selah.
I mention Rahab and Babylon among those who acknowledge Me; Philistia, and Tyre, and Cush—each was born there.
Indeed, it shall be said of Zion, “Every man was born there.” He, the Most High, will preserve it.
The Lord will inscribe in the register of peoples that each was born there. Selah.
Singers and dancers alike [will say]: “All my roots are in You.”
